seo.title: Portuguese chicken - nice and strong, quick-quick - Marinda Kook

html:
The cold hasn't left the Cape yet. I feel like something that warms you from the inside and doesn't take too long in front of the stove. Here's a lovely spicy recipe for chicken done in the oven. Serve it with fresh bread, salad or sweet potatoes baked in the oven.

 

YOU NEED:

  • 1 large pack of chicken
  • 1 onion in rings
  • 125 ml olive oil
  • 125 ml lemon juice
  • 125 ml soy sauce
  • Portuguese chicken spice – as strong as you'd like it. I used 100 ml and it was nice and strong.

NOW:

  1. pack the chicken on the onions in a roasting dish and rub all sides with the Portuguese chicken spice
  2. mix the olive oil, lemon juice and soy sauce and pour over the chicken
  3. bake for 30 min at 180 degrees Celsius covered with tinfoil
  4. remove the foil and bake for another 40 minutes uncovered

 

You're going to lick your fingers. It's deeeeeelicious.
